text:
(In reply to eimar.koort from comment #68)
glad that it works ! ...
all credits to Mark ...
wouldn't have been a solution to unplug/replug the Geekworm-board if power is on... some boards are extremely sensitive.. 2 weeks ago I toasted my RockPro64 only by one-touch-hotplug(although I guess the RPI4 is a bit less sensitive in that discipline).
